introSection: Bukkerittet is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Kongeparken in Ålgård, Rogaland, Norway.
fullText:
Bukkerittet is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster built by French manufacturer Reverchon currently located at Kongeparken in Ålgård, Rogaland, Norway.



Yellow track and brown supports.
